title: tragacantha augana
intro: Tragacantha augana, also known as Astragalus gummifer or gum tragacanth, is a plant-based adhesive made from the sap of the Astragalus plant, specifically the Astragalus gummifer. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Tragacanth gum include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections, as well as being used as a natural laxative. Tragacanth gum is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, powders, and teas, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
